headlines.description: — Jalen Suggs scored a season-high 23 points and added seven assists, and the Orlando Magic rolled to a 129-101 win over the Los Angeles Clippers on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Suggs scores season-high 23 points as Magic roll to 129-101 win over Clippers

headlines.description: — Santi Aldama scored 29 points, Jock Landale added 21 and the Memphis Grizzlies built a big first-half lead and sent the Sacramento Kings to their eighth straight loss, 137-96 on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Aldama scores 29 points to help Grizzlies send Kings to 8th straight loss, 137-96

headlines.description: — Tyrese Maxey scored a career-high 54 points and tied the game by hitting two free throws with seven seconds left in the fourth quarter of the Philadelphia 76ers' 123-114 overtime victory over the Milwaukee Bucks on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Maxey scores career-high 54 points as 76ers outlast Bucks 123-114 in overtime

events.name: Atlanta Hawks at San Antonio Spurs

headlines.description: — De'Aaron Fox scored 26 points, Keldon Johnson had 25 and the San Antonio Spurs won their third straight without Victor Wembanyama, toppling the Atlanta Hawks 135-126 on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Fox, Johnson lead Spurs to third straight victory without Wembanyama, toppling Hawks 135-126
